# @architecture/validate-source-imports

Validates that TypeScript/JS source files only import from permitted packages per the architecture import-boundary rules.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/validate-source-imports
Version: 0.1.0
Component: validate-source-imports
Type: tool
System: architecture-governance
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: architecture
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: tooling
Class: active.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Walk apps/ and packages/ source files
- Extract static imports, re-exports, dynamic imports, and import-type nodes via the TypeScript compiler API
- Enforce universal rules: no deep imports, no test-support in production files, no relative cross-package imports
- Enforce per-package boundary rules derived from import-boundary-rules.json
- Detect package import cycles in strict mode
- Detect unresolved relative and @platform/* imports in strict mode
- Write JSON and Markdown validation reports
- Write committed governance evidence with --write

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not perform full TypeScript type-checking or compiler module resolution
- Does not validate runtime node_modules installation
- Does not validate path aliases or tsconfig path mappings

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Run from repository root with node tools/architecture/validate-source-imports/src/index.mjs
- Use --root <path>, --format text|json, --no-reports, --check (default), --write per ADR-0011
- Positional arguments are scan root directories relative to --root; defaults to apps packages

## Boundaries

### Allowed consumers

```text
tooling
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
external
```

```text
Production: false
Test only: false
Service name: validate-source-imports

development
test
```

```

```

## Operational notes

- Validation reports are written under reports/validation unless --no-reports is supplied
- Self-evidence is written under reports/tooling/validate-source-imports unless --no-reports is supplied
- Committed governance evidence is written to docs/evidence/import-boundaries/ with --write
